RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0012 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Liam Dubois Date of Birth: 27/03/1985 SSN (tokenized): TKN-630902 Annual Income: $161,000 Loan Amount: $60,000 Branch: Berlin Employment: [x] Full-time [x] Self-employed Housing: [x] Own [ ] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN73592AL Honda Elantra 2024 EV New 31,000 VIN48998AL Tesla Elantra 2022 EV CPO 23,000 Authorized Signature: Liam Dubois
